text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Morning, Trainer! Yeesh, you're lookin' sleepy
today.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ya gotta get up bright 'n early to do some
aerobics exercises! Those'll wake ya right up!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hup! Now bend your ears back and... snap
forward! Back... and snap!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I join Tamamo Cross for her unique morning
exercises.
